metric_definitions.cpr: Compile Pass Rate — fraction of model outputs that compile at rev2.
metric_definitions.tpr: Test Pass Rate — fraction of model-produced tests that pass at rev2.
metric_definitions.coverage_delta: Increase in line coverage on changed lines compared to the old test. Only applies to the test_update track.
metric_definitions.line_coverage: Line coverage of the focal method achieved by the model's test.
metric_definitions.mutation_score: Mutation score of the focal method under the model's test (e.g. via PIT).
